discussion_posts.name: kun_10
discussion_posts.content: Request to problem writers: Please describe clearly what you want. Sometimes, I feel like we are taking English comprehension tests rather than algorithmic problems.

discussion_posts.name: sacso
discussion_posts.content: If someone asks me this in a 45m interview I'm ending the call

discussion_posts.name: jchoubankai
discussion_posts.content:
bruh this problem description is so bad I had to read the editorial to understand the question.

for anyone who doesn't understand input:
- it only takes in 1 char at a time, you need to keep track of the current total input (prefix)
- calling input adds 1 char at a time to the prefix
- calling input with '#' means that you reset the input and add the total input as a sentence
